parsed.availability_comment: Available for the published fixtures unless hamstring issue recurs.
parsed.availability_note: Had a right-hamstring injury in December 2025 but returned in January 2026; no fresh RR/CSA unavailability found for IPL 2026.
parsed.followup_reason: No official RR playing-XI confirmation yet, and Burger's exact pecking order versus Milne/Maphaka for the opening games remains unconfirmed.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Strong competition remains, but current squad balance points to genuine opening-game contention.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes mainly with Archer, Hetmyer, Milne and Maphaka for four overseas spots; left-arm pace gives him a distinct role edge over Maphaka/Milne depending on conditions.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: In RR's 2026 squad and likely to benefit from an overseas opening created by Sam Curran's reported injury; still competes with Archer, Hetmyer, Milne and Maphaka.
